channel.title: R on {David Clark | Blog}
channel.description: Recent content in R on {David Clark | Blog}

item.title: Creating Vim macros for comment titles blocks in Stata and R
item.description: So, after a short-lived love affair with Vim late last year, I decided to see if we could give it another go (in part due to the fact that I need to find methods of boosting productivity with the imminence of my PhD deadline). Luckily, it didn’t take me too long to remember the basic key binding to get around Vim and I already had a decent .vimrc set up, so what was the issue?
